config.maidbridge.title: MaidBridge
Run the MaidBridge WebSocket server at the URL below and allow external Agent clients to connect.
config.maidbridge.websocket_url.tooltip: MaidBridge WebSocket server listen endpoint, for example ws://127.0.0.1:8765/maidbridge.
config.maidbridge.enable_multiplayer_mai: Allow non-owner players to open native TLM maid AI chat, send messages, and view shared history. Non-owners cannot edit AI settings or clear history.
config.maidbridge.enable_external_agent_: Allow external maid Agents to attach TLM emoji packs, kaomoji bubbles, or MaiBot native emoji beside reply text.
config.maidbridge.external_emoji_cache_t: How long the server keeps external emoji texture payloads for clients that start tracking the maid later.
config.maidbridge.max_external_emoji_cac: Maximum number of external emoji texture payloads kept for resend.
config.maidbridge.enable_server_chat_bri: Publish Minecraft public chat as one group chat room for external clients.
config.maidbridge.enable_external_server: When enabled, text sent by MaiBot or another external client to the server group chat is shown in Minecraft chat. When disabled, MaidBridge only reads MC chat and does not write back.
Room name shown to external clients for Minecraft server group chat.
config.maidbridge.server_chat_system_bro: Prefix added only to external system broadcasts before they are sent to Minecraft players. Normal member messages do not use it.
config.maidbridge.enable_server_chat_mai: Reserved for a later feature: server group chat replies may trigger actions on maids that are already loaded. It does not affect chat now and never loads chunks for the action.
config.maidbridge.max_server_chat_text_c: Maximum number of characters allowed in one inbound server group chat message; normal Minecraft chat follows the vanilla 256-character limit.
config.maidbridge.websocket_access_token: Optional Bearer Token used by external MaidBridge clients when connecting to the WebSocket server.
config.maidbridge.server_chat_use_raw_te: Use Raw Text for Server Group Chat
config.maidbridge.max_pending_server_cha: Server Group Chat Inbound Queue Limit
